g.text: This endorsement modifies coverage provided under the Homeowners
Policy (HO-3 06 10). Attached to and forming part of Policy Number
, effective 09/15/2025.
A. SCHEDULE
Named Insured: Kowalski, Daniel J. & Anne M.
Residence Premises: 1847 Maple Drive, Boston, MA 02130
B. EXCLUSION — WATER DAMAGE
Section I — Exclusions is amended to add the following:
1. Excluded Causes of Loss
We do not insure for loss caused directly or indirectly by water damage,
meaning:
a. Flood, surface water, waves, tidal water, overflow of a body of
water, or spray from any of these, whether or not driven by wind.
b. Water which backs up through sewers or drains or which
overflows from a sump.
c. Water below the surface of the ground, including water which
exerts pressure on or seeps or leaks through a building,
sidewalk, driveway, foundation, swimming pool, or other structure.
2. Carve-Out — Ice Dams
This exclusion does NOT apply to water damage caused by ice dams as
defined in Section I — Perils Insured Against, paragraph B.3.c of the
HO-3 policy form. Coverage for ice-dam-induced interior water
damage is preserved under the base policy, subject to the
deductible and all other policy terms.
3. Burden of Proof
Where a claim is submitted for interior water damage, the "insured"
must provide evidence that the loss originated from a covered peril
and not from any excluded cause listed in paragraph 1 of this
endorsement. Acceptable evidence includes a roof inspection report,
contractor assessment, or photographs at the time of loss.
C. ALL OTHER TERMS REMAIN UNCHANGED

svg.text: Water Damage Exclusion Endorsement — Policy 4927773733 — Page 1 of 1
